title: Studio Source Tree Reorganization Inventory
content_html:
This document is archived and is no longer maintained.

Studio Source Tree Reorganization Inventory

This inventory supports Studio Source Tree Reorganization Request and Studio Source Tree Reorganization Tasks.

The classifications are path-family level decisions from the pre-move inventory, with current target paths recorded where moves have landed. STSR-004 resolved the ambiguous ownership rows before file moves began. This inventory does not authorize compatibility paths, migration aliases, copied source artifacts, or serving old Studio-owned source from public asset paths.

Resolved STSR-004 Decisions

  • Current Jekyll-shaped Studio and UI Catalogue route hosts are Studio-owned cleanup targets, not public-site source. Active demo pages can remain until their move task, but _layouts/studio.html and Studio-specific includes have no final public owner.
  • Docs Viewer shell, management shell, runtime config, UI text, CSS, reports, services, source scopes, and search builder logic are Docs Viewer-owned and live as a coherent internal subtree under studio/docs-viewer/. Public read-only routes may keep only minimal Jekyll adapters and generated runtime payloads outside studio/.
  • Docs Viewer report source/config/runtime belongs with Docs Viewer. Report input data remains with its source domain, such as Studio-owned change request logs.
  • studio/workflows/change-requests/ source is Studio-owned workflow data. Generated log/report working output lives under Studio workflow generated paths unless a later task identifies a public generated payload required by a read-only route.
  • studio/data/canonical/catalogue-markdown/ and canonical catalogue JSON are Studio canonical data. Derived catalogue lookup payloads are Studio editor read models with a schema contract; disposable caches belong under var/, not tracked source.
  • Checks, tests, fixtures, smoke helpers, projection contracts, public-surface audits, and public-site build/preview helpers are Studio/Codex development infrastructure, even when they validate published routes.
  • Search ownership splits by domain: Catalogue search generation/config/policy belongs to Studio; Docs Viewer search generation/config belongs to Docs Viewer; public search route JavaScript and generated search payloads remain public runtime/output.
  • assets/docs/interactive/ is Docs Viewer interactive source asset input. It moves with Docs Viewer source/runtime unless a specific generated public copy is required for read-only published docs.
  • Public route directories such as analysis/, library/, docs/, search/, catalogue/, works/, series/, data/, and logs/ remain public route surfaces only when they publish pages or generated runtime payloads. Studio-only local route shells do not remain there as final source.
Previous path family Classification Current owner / target direction Notes / follow-up
studio/ Studio source Move or reshape into the final repo-level studio/ app boundary. Existing Jekyll-shaped route hosts under studio/, including active UI Catalogue demos, are Studio-owned cleanup/move targets for later move slices.
studio/ui-catalogue/ Studio source Keep under a clear studio/ui-catalogue/ home. Current demo route source should remain Studio-owned and should not be treated as public Jekyll source.
_ui_catalogue_notes/ Studio source Move under studio/ui-catalogue/notes/ or equivalent. Source notes for UI Catalogue reference material; not public publishing surface.
_includes/ui_catalogue_notes/ Studio source Move with UI Catalogue notes/runtime under studio/ui-catalogue/notes/ or the final UI Catalogue home chosen in STSR-005. UI Catalogue is Studio-owned, so _includes/ is not a final public home. If Liquid integration is still needed during STSR-016, keep only a minimal adapter outside Studio.
assets/ui-catalogue/ Studio source Move under studio/ui-catalogue/assets/ or equivalent. Demo CSS/JS assets belong with Studio UI Catalogue, not the public Jekyll surface.
assets/docs/ui-catalogue/ Studio source Move under studio/ui-catalogue/demos/ or equivalent. UI Catalogue demo pages/assets are Studio reference surfaces, not public site assets by default.
_docs/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved to studio/docs-viewer/source/studio/. Canonical Docs Viewer source Markdown for the Studio docs scope. It is not special; it is the default source folder for /docs/ manage mode. Docs Viewer report documents in this scope, such as change-history.md, move with Docs Viewer even when they read Studio-owned data. Generated JSON remains public output.
_docs_analysis/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved to studio/docs-viewer/source/analysis/. Canonical Docs Viewer source Markdown for the analysis scope. Docs Viewer owns whether this scope is available locally through Studio, publicly at /analysis/, or both.
_docs_library/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved to studio/docs-viewer/source/library/. Canonical Docs Viewer source Markdown for the library scope. Docs Viewer owns whether this scope is available locally through Studio, publicly at /library/, or both.
_docs_logs/entries/ Studio source Moved to studio/workflows/change-requests/logs/entries/. Change request workflow source data. Not a Docs Viewer scope, even when a Docs Viewer-owned report reads it.
_docs_logs/generated/, _docs_logs/reports/ Studio generated working output Moved to studio/workflows/change-requests/generated/ and studio/workflows/change-requests/reports/. Generated logs are consumed by Codex and may be read by Docs Viewer reports for human browsing. Report access does not transfer data ownership; Docs Viewer report read access should be explicit in the source/config allowlist.
assets/docs-viewer/js/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved to studio/docs-viewer/runtime/js/. Runtime, management browser code, and report modules are currently localized enough to keep as a coherent internal Docs Viewer subtree. Report modules may read allowed data owned by other repo domains.
assets/docs-viewer/css/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved to studio/docs-viewer/assets/css/. Docs Viewer CSS should not be buried in generic Studio CSS.
assets/docs-viewer/data/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Moved source config and UI text to studio/docs-viewer/config/runtime/ and studio/docs-viewer/config/ui-text/. docs-viewer-config.json and ui-text.json are Docs Viewer source/config. Public install config, such as docs-viewer-public-config.json, is published from the moved Docs Viewer runtime config path when read-only installs need it.
_includes/docs_viewer_shell.html, _includes/docs_viewer_management_route.html, _includes/docs_viewer_readonly_route.html Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate / route integration Move Docs Viewer shell and management source under studio/docs-viewer/runtime/shells/ or equivalent; keep only minimal public read-only route adapters outside Studio if required for routes such as /library/ and /analysis/. _includes/ is not the final home for Docs Viewer-owned source. A public adapter may remain only as Jekyll integration that points at generated public runtime/data and does not embed Docs Viewer shell internals.
scripts/docs/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Move now under studio/docs-viewer/server/, studio/docs-viewer/services/, and studio/docs-viewer/config/ as appropriate. Includes Docs Viewer build, management, source model, import/export, watcher, generated-read, and scope config code. Preserve internal Docs Viewer boundary.
studio/workflows/change-requests/services/ Studio source Move under a Studio-owned change request workflow service home. Current code supports docs log source/index workflows. It is not Docs Viewer service code, though its reports may be surfaced through /docs/.
assets/data/docs/scopes/ Public generated output Remain outside studio/ in the public Jekyll asset surface. Generated JSON payloads read by Docs Viewer public installs and Studio docs routes. Generators move; output path remains public.
assets/data/search/studio/, assets/data/search/library/, assets/data/search/analysis/ Public generated output Remain outside studio/ in the public Jekyll asset surface. Generated search payloads. Builders may move under Studio/Docs Viewer, but outputs stay public.
assets/data/docs/reports.json Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate / public runtime payload Move source/config ownership under studio/docs-viewer/config/reports.json or equivalent; keep a generated public copy outside studio/ when read-only Docs Viewer installs need report registry/config at runtime. Docs Viewer report registry/config, not Studio change-log data. Reports can be available in read-only installs such as /library/; manage-only reports display only in manage mode, currently /docs/.
_docs_catalogue/ Studio source Moved to studio/data/canonical/catalogue-markdown/. Canonical publishing Markdown for works, series, and moments. Studio writes it and public catalogue JSON is generated from it.
assets/studio/data/catalogue/ Studio source Move under studio/data/canonical/catalogue/ or equivalent. Canonical catalogue JSON source should not remain under public assets.
assets/studio/data/catalogue_lookup/ Studio generated lookup data Move under Studio as generated editor lookup/read-model data, such as studio/data/generated/catalogue_lookup/. This supports Studio editor pages, not public pages such as /series/. Treat lookup as a derived read model with a schema/contract; disposable cache and temporary regeneration state belongs under var/studio/ or var/catalogue/, not tracked source.
assets/studio/data/ui_text/ Studio source Move under studio/app/config/ or studio/app/frontend/config/. Studio UI copy/config belongs inside Studio.
assets/studio/data/studio_config.json Studio source Move under Studio runtime/config. Local Studio static config, not public site data.
assets/studio/js/ Studio source Moved to studio/app/frontend/js/. Studio app browser code, editors, shell, clients, and workflow modules.
assets/studio/css/ Studio source Moved to studio/app/assets/css/. Studio-only CSS. Also split Studio-only selectors out of public assets/css/main.css.
assets/studio/img/panel-backgrounds/ Studio source Moved to studio/app/assets/img/panel-backgrounds/. Studio-only visual assets.
assets/studio/img/thumbnail-quality/ Studio generated/reusable workflow asset Move under Studio local/generated review output or a retained Studio workflow asset home. This was a one-off Studio workflow artifact retained in case it can be reused. It is not public publishing surface.
_includes/studio_header_nav.html, _includes/studio_module_script.html Removed Studio cleanup candidate Delete after confirming no active route depends on them. Removed in STSR-007; public _layouts/default.html no longer branches into Studio header navigation, and ready-state audit no longer treats studio_module_script.html as an active route mechanism.
_layouts/studio.html Studio source / cleanup candidate Remove after confirming no active route depends on it, or move remaining Studio route shell behavior into Studio shell/runtime ownership. Current UI Catalogue demo pages still reference this layout. Treat that as a Studio-owned cleanup/move dependency for STSR-016, not public Jekyll source.
scripts/studio/ Studio source Move under studio/app/server/ and studio/app/views/ or equivalent. Local Studio server, APIs, config, views, and route adapters.
scripts/analytics/ Studio source Move under studio/services/analytics/. Studio-owned analytics/tag maintenance services and write workflows.
scripts/catalogue/ Studio source Move under studio/services/catalogue/. Studio-owned catalogue services, source mutations, build orchestration, prose import, validation, and projections. Public outputs remain outside Studio.
scripts/media/ Studio source Move under studio/services/media/. Studio-owned media maintenance and preview workflows. Public published media remains outside Studio.
studio/checks/ Studio source Move under Studio checks/test ownership, such as studio/checks/. Checks may validate the public publishing surface, but they are development/testing infrastructure run by Studio/Codex, not public site source. projection_contract.json, source-boundary checks, and public-build audits should move under Studio check/config ownership.
scripts/search/ Studio source / future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Split builders/config by search domain owner: Studio owns Catalogue search generation and policy; Docs Viewer owns Docs Viewer search generation/config; generated public search payloads remain outside Studio. Public routes own only browser runtime that displays published search data, such as /search/ and catalogue route scripts.
scripts/build_docs.rb, studio/docs-viewer/build/build_docs.rb Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Move the Docs Viewer build implementation under studio/docs-viewer/build/; keep a root developer command only as an intentional entrypoint that delegates to the new owner. Root command retention must not become old-path compatibility for source.
scripts/build_search.rb, studio/docs-viewer/build/build_search.rb, scripts/search/build_search.rb Studio source / future Docs Viewer extraction candidate Split by search domain owner; generated search outputs remain public. Catalogue search builder/config belongs to Studio. Docs Viewer search builder/config belongs to Docs Viewer. Root commands should be intentional developer entrypoints, not old-path compatibility.
studio/commands/run_checks.py Studio source Move under Studio/Codex testing ownership or keep only a deliberate root convenience entrypoint that delegates to Studio. Testing is development infrastructure, not public site publishing source. Root command retention must not preserve old Studio source paths.
scripts/display_paths.py, scripts/local_env.py, scripts/pipeline_config.py, scripts/script_logging.py Studio source / shared development utility Move under Studio-owned shared utility support unless a root convenience entrypoint has a deliberate reason to remain. These are development/build/runtime helper utilities, not published-page runtime. Consumers should import from the final Studio utility path after the move, without old-path aliases.
scripts/jekyll_markdown_renderer.rb, scripts/render_markdown_with_jekyll.rb, scripts/jekyll_webrick_client_reset_filter.rb Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate / Studio source Move Markdown rendering helpers under Docs Viewer build ownership when used for Docs Viewer payloads; move any remaining public-site preview/build support under Studio-owned build tooling. Build scripts and render helpers are not public site runtime. Public site should keep only publishing config and runtime scripts for published pages.
bin/local-studio Studio source Move implementation under Studio command/runtime ownership; keep a root bin/local-studio only as an intentional convenience entrypoint to launch Studio. A root convenience entrypoint is acceptable only if it delegates to Studio-owned code and does not preserve old source paths.
bin/public-site-build, bin/public-site-preview Studio source / root convenience entrypoint Move implementation under Studio-owned development/build tooling; keep root commands only as deliberate convenience entrypoints if needed. Public-site build/preview commands are development infrastructure, not published-page runtime. They may validate or preview the public Jekyll site, but ownership belongs with Studio/Codex tooling.
studio/tests/smoke/ Studio source Move under Studio/Codex test ownership. Smoke tests may validate public routes, but testing is development infrastructure and should live under Studio, not the public publishing surface.
studio/tests/python/ Studio source Move under Studio/Codex test ownership. Python tests validate Studio, Docs Viewer, generators, checks, and public-output contracts; they are not public site runtime.
studio/tests/fixtures/ Studio source Move fixtures with the tests, services, or Docs Viewer modules that own them. Fixture ownership follows development/testing ownership, not public publishing.
assets/css/main.css Public Jekyll source with Studio leakage Keep public CSS outside Studio; move Studio-only selectors into Studio CSS. STSR-014 owns the selector-level split; this row records only the ownership principle.
assets/js/ Public Jekyll source Remain outside studio/. Public route JavaScript reads generated JSON and powers published pages. Verify no Studio-only modules remain.
assets/data/works_index.json, assets/data/series_index.json, assets/data/moments_index.json, assets/data/recent_index.json Public generated output Remain outside studio/. Public route indexes consumed by Jekyll pages/browser runtime. Generators move; outputs stay public.
assets/works/index/, assets/series/index/, assets/moments/index/, assets/work_details/ Public generated output Remain outside studio/. Generated public catalogue detail/index payloads.
assets/works/img/, assets/series/img/, assets/moments/img/, assets/work_details/img/, assets/home/img/, assets/site/ Public Jekyll source / public assets Remain outside studio/. Published thumbnails, media, and site assets required by GitHub Pages/Jekyll.
assets/docs/interactive/ Future Docs Viewer extraction candidate / generated public asset input Move source interactive HTML assets with Docs Viewer source/runtime, such as studio/docs-viewer/source-assets/interactive/; keep or generate public copies only where read-only published docs need to load them. The current builder/import flow treats these as same-scope Docs Viewer interactive assets. Consumer-specific public copies should be explicit output/runtime artifacts, not the source home.
_includes/artist_line.html, _includes/nav_item.html, _includes/work_index_item.html Public Jekyll source Remain outside studio/. Public Jekyll includes used by published layouts/routes.
_layouts/default.html, _layouts/about.html, _layouts/work.html, _layouts/series.html, _layouts/moment.html, _layouts/work_details.html Public Jekyll source Remain outside studio/. Public site layouts.
_works/, _series/, _moments/, _work_details/, _works_print/ Public Jekyll source Remain outside studio/ unless a subpath is proven Studio-only. Public collection/source pages for GitHub Pages/Jekyll.
works/, series/, catalogue/, recent/, search/, analysis/, library/, docs/, data/, logs/ Public Jekyll source / public route surface Remain outside studio/ for published routes and minimal route shells. Route pages may read public generated output from assets/data/.... Studio-only local route shells do not have final ownership here; move or delete them in the relevant Studio/Docs Viewer route slices.
_data/ Public Jekyll source Remain outside studio/ unless individual data files are Studio-only. Jekyll data source for public site.
_config.yml, .ruby-version, Gemfile, Gemfile.lock Public Jekyll source / out-of-scope dependency Remain outside studio/. Jekyll/GitHub Pages infrastructure and package tooling are not Studio source.
var/docs/catalogue/import-staging/ Studio local working output Keep local/unpublished; move or retarget under Studio-owned local working paths if needed. Used by catalogue prose import for studio/data/canonical/catalogue-markdown/ staging. Not source of record.
var/docs/, var/studio/, var/catalogue/ Studio local working output Keep local runtime/backups/logs outside published site; retarget paths if Studio source moves require it. These are operational outputs, backups, logs, previews, and staging, not public publishing source.
var/test-runs/, .pytest_cache/, __pycache__/, .DS_Store, _site/, tmp/ Out-of-scope dependency Do not move as source; clean only under explicit cleanup tasks. Generated caches/build artifacts/local noise.
